parameters.text:
={{ $json.errorMsg ? `⚠️ *PostHog Daily — ${$json.dateStr}*

_PostHog API error:_ \`${$json.errorMsg}\`

Перевірте \`POSTHOG_API_KEY\` / \`POSTHOG_PROJECT_ID\` / \`POSTHOG_HOST\` на n8n Railway.` : `📈 *PostHog Daily — ${$json.dateStr}*

👥 DAU: \`${$json.dau}\`
📱 Pageviews: \`${$json.pageviews}\`

_[PostHog →](${$env.POSTHOG_HOST || 'https://eu.i.posthog.com'})_` }}
